## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Owen Alzate's potential role at growthx.ai and assess mutual fit.](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Kyle, new sales team lead at growthx.ai, is looking to build and improve sales processes](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Owen has 7 years of diverse sales experience and is seeking growth opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Both share an interest in music production and see value in AI tools for work](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [growthx.ai is experiencing rapid growth (50 employees) and has a unique, highly effective sales approach](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)

## Topics

### Company Background and Kyle's Role

  - [Kyle joined growthx.ai as its first customer about a year ago](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Company has grown from \~8 to 50 employees in a short time](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Kyle recently moved from leading customer engagements to heading the sales team](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Seeking to build more repeatable processes while maintaining current effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)

### Owen's Experience and Skills

  - [7 years in sales, covering lead generation, cold calling, email marketing, and sales enablement](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Experience with various CRM platforms and productivity tools](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Comfortable with AI tools, particularly for language assistance and music production](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Values flexibility and cross-team collaboration in startup environments](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### AI and Technology

  - [Owen uses AI for grammar correction, email writing, and music production](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Familiar with tools like Perplexity AI](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Recognizes AI's growing importance in various industries](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
  - [Both Kyle and Owen share an interest in music production software (Logic, Reason, Ableton)](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)

### Sales Philosophy and Mentorship

  - [Owen emphasizes the importance of embracing unpredictability in sales](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Focuses on building relationships rather than just closing deals](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Believes in mental preparation and resilience for sales success](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [Kyle agrees, highlighting the importance of focusing on controllable factors](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Expectations and Next Steps

  - [growthx.ai seeks proactive team members who can think critically about processes](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Current sales process is "scrappy" but highly effective (e.g., closing 12-month deals in 1-2 calls)](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
  - [Looking for team members to help iterate and improve scalable, repeatable processes](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
  - [Next step: Owen to speak with Bruno, followed by a potential quick start if all goes well](https://fathom.video/share/y11HiQxhVbsye1LfUdcSsF9PyvfFpDTt?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)

## Next Steps

  - Kyle to discuss Owen's candidacy with the team
  - Arrange a meeting between Owen and Bruno
  - Make a decision on Owen's potential hiring
  - If positive, initiate rapid onboarding process
